stemHtml: After the words PAN PAN three times, an ideal urgency message should contain information on certain elements, preferably given in a specific order. Which option most accurately describes the ideal urgency message?

options.a: Last known position, airspeed, pilot’s intentions, altitude.
options.b: Call sign, last known position, time at that position, altitude, pilot’s intentions.
options.c: Name of the station addressed, call sign, nature of the urgency condition, pilot’s intentions, position, level and heading.
options.d: Name of the station addressed, nature of urgency condition, call sign, heading, airspeed, pilot’s intentions, any other useful information.
